---
title: "Eleanor Catharine Price"
---

## Eleanor Catharine Price

**Dates:** (b. 1848?)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1882-98)

### Biography

She was author of <i>One Only</i> (1874), <i>Valentina</i>  (1882), <i>A Lost Battle</i> (1878) and about 50 other titles to 1932. She was one of the co-authors (with CMY) of <i>The Miz-Maze</i>, and evidently a friend of Amelie Leroy and Anna Bramston’s. [norg@mc2.vicnet.net.au Mr Norman Gardiner, who is studying her; COPAC]

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from Sept 12  [1899?]
- Letter from [<i>c</i>. 1898][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Decr 20th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
